prompt_md:
A team is wiring an AI code-review bot into their CI pipeline. Complete each blank with the correct token concept.

1. Before the bot can review a PR, its diff is split into the small pieces a model reads, a step called ___.
2. Each of those small pieces — often a piece of a word or a single brace rather than a whole word — is called a ___.
3. A 20,000-line generated file may be too many tokens to fit at once because every model has a fixed context ___.
4. Because the provider prices the diff sent in differently from the comments generated, the team budgets ___ tokens and output tokens separately.
